name: Aterian, Inc.
description: Aterian, Inc. is a leading technology-enabled consumer products company that builds, acquires, and partners with e-commerce brands. The company utilizes its proprietary software platform, AIMEE (Artificial Intelligence Marketplace Ecommerce Engine), to leverage data science and machine learning for managing products across various online marketplaces, including Amazon, Walmart, and eBay. Aterian focuses on high-growth consumer categories such as home and kitchen appliances, health and wellness, and environmental devices, aiming to streamline the supply chain and optimize digital marketing strategies for its diverse portfolio of brands.
